Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Whitehall]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Elder Whitehall wears a Jade arrow badge on his chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — Elder Whitehall provided Lindon with a token.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Whitehall is an elder of the Heaven's Glory School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Elder Whitehall's body is at the Iron stage and his spirit is at the Jade stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Elder Whitehall uses the Heaven’s Lance technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Whitehall is a Jade leader of the Heaven's Glory School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Whitehall is a child wearing bloodstained white robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Whitehall wields a halfsilver dagger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Whitehall leaves behind a golden Remnant that looks like a twisted dwarf or deformed imp.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Whitehall is an old man trapped in a boy's body.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
